name: ModifyDataRefreshmentPointAgency
description: Edit the data pertaining to a designated point of rest.
postconditions: The system has been reporting the information required by the point of rest.
The system has been reporting the information required by the point of rest.
Interruption of the connection to the server ETOUR.
steps: View a list of points of rest as a result of the use case SearchRefreshmentPoint, it selects an active and functional data changes.
Upload data from the point of rest and displays the form of change.
Change data in the form and submit.
Verify the data entered in form and asks for confirmation of the transaction. Where the data is invalid or insufficient, the system activates the use case Errored.
Stores the modified data of the point of rest.
quality_requirements: The system requirements blocks of input controls in the form once we receive confirmation of the change to avoid multiple submissions before the end of the operation.
